title: ConvMemory v3: A Validity Context Layer for Conversational Memory via Target-Conditioned Relation Verification
abstract: arXiv:2606.26753v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Conversational memory retrieval optimizes relevance, yet a retrieved memory can be relevant and simultaneously outdated: a later turn updates, corrects, or supersedes it. ConvMemory v3 adds a validity context layer that detects and surfaces this update evidence through target-conditioned relation verification, sitting after the v1/v2 retrieval path. The core mechanism is a dual-evidence gate that conditions a relation judgment on the specific target proposition, scoring a (target, source) pair through the product of a MiniLM slot head and a DeBERTa-v3 slot head and gating it by conservative event/operation evidence. On a synthetic multi-hop validity benchmark the gate reaches 90.12% +/- 1.73 accuracy; through a real-data feedback loop that mines failure patterns but trains on synthetic pairs only, the verifier transfers to Memora role binding with zero target-side labels, reaching 98.8% +/- 0.9 group-all-correct. The deployed layer prese

translated_title: ConvMemory v3：一种通过目标条件关系验证实现对话记忆的有效性上下文层
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26753v1 公告类型：新论文 摘要：对话记忆检索优化了相关性，但检索到的记忆可能既相关又过时：后续轮次会更新、纠正或取代它。ConvMemory v3 增加了一个有效性上下文层，该层通过目标条件关系验证来检测并呈现这种更新证据，位于 v1/v2 检索路径之后。其核心机制是一个双证据门控，它根据特定目标命题来调节关系判断，通过 MiniLM 槽头和 DeBERTa-v3 槽头的乘积对（目标，来源）对进行评分，并通过保守的事件/操作证据进行门控。在一个合成的多跳有效性基准测试中，该门控达到了 90.12% ± 1.73 的准确率；通过一个挖掘失败模式但仅使用合成对进行训练的真实数据反馈循环，该验证器在零目标侧标签的情况下迁移到 Memora 角色绑定，达到了 98.8% ± 0.9 的组全正确率。部署的层会预先筛选记忆，以过滤掉过时或无效的记忆。
tldr: ConvMemory v3 通过一种基于目标条件关系验证的双证据门控机制，在对话记忆检索后增加了一个有效性上下文层，能有效检测并过滤过时或无效的记忆，在合成基准和真实任务迁移中均取得了高准确率。
en_tdlr: ConvMemory v3 introduces a validity context layer after conversational memory retrieval, using a dual-evidence gate based on target-conditioned relation verification to detect and filter outdated or invalid memories, achieving high accuracy on synthetic benchmarks and real-world task transfer.
